mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id AS course_courseId, c.title AS course_title, ts.period AS testSchedule_period, u.name AS tbUserinfo_name, c.start_date AS course_startDate, c.end_date AS course_endDate, cc.class_name AS courseClass_className, ts.title AS testSchedule_title, ts.date AS testSchedule_date, ts.status AS testSchedule_status FROM test_schedule ts JOIN course c ON ts.course_id = c.course_id JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id JOIN tb_userinfo u ON c.professor = u.loginID ORDER BY ts.date DESC;

SELECT c.course_id AS course_courseId, c.title AS course_title, cc.class_name AS courseClass_className, u.name AS tbUserinfo_name, ts.title AS testSchedule_title, ts.date AS testSchedule_date, ts.status AS testSchedule_status, ts.period AS testSchedule_period FROM test_schedule ts JOIN course c ON ts.course_id = c.course_id JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id JOIN tb_userinfo u ON c.professor = u.loginID WHERE ts.course_id = #{courseId} AND ts.period = #{period};
mapper.update: UPDATE test_schedule SET status = #{status}, date = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 AND date IS NULL THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE date END WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND period = #{period}
